title: If/Else Block
description: Write a conditional block that prints a message based on a score value.
problemStatement:
Control the flow! Given `$score = 75`. If `$score >= 50`, print `"Passed"`. Otherwise, print `"Failed"`.

**Requirement:** Use a standard `if/else` block.
hints: Semicolons are required after the `echo` statements inside the curly braces.
